productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Woven Steel Track Pant
description: CompositionDark steel full length tracks pants made of 100% cotton, with a mesh lining, welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the leg lengthFittingComfortWash careWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron motif/print/trims/logoThese adidas track pants are designed to add comfort and style while you focus on your performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs. Created using a dry comfort technology, these track pants keep you comfortably cool. While the soft and broad elastic waist band sits snugly on the waist, the white strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The drawstrings on the inside provide you with a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold all your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
